# Highland Glaziers

> Highland Glaziers is a premier aluminium construction company based in Kisumu, Kenya, specializing in the fabrication and installation of windows, doors, curtain walls, and facades for residential and commercial projects.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.highlandglaziers.app/): Overview of Highland Glaziers and our aluminium construction services.
- [About](https://www.highlandglaziers.app/about): Learn about our company, experience, and values.
- [Services](https://www.highlandglaziers.app/services): Detailed breakdown of our aluminium windows, doors, curtain walls, and facade services.
- [Projects](https://www.highlandglaziers.app/projects): Portfolio of completed aluminium construction and glazing projects.
- [Contact](https://www.highlandglaziers.app/contact): Request a free quote or get in touch with our team.

## Contact

- Phone: +254 712 020 924
